sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: COHERENT CORP.의 공시 핵심을 한국어로 요약했습니다.

keyPoints.text: Q1 FY26 매출 15억 8,100만 달러(전분기 15억 2,900만 달러 대비 증가), AI·데이터센터 수요 성장 지속
비GAAP EPS 1.16달러(전년비 0.49달러 증가)로 수익성 확대 추세 지속

riskChanges.text: 400백만 달러 규모 자본 지출 확대를 예고, 단기 GAAP 비용 부담 상존

businessChanges.text: AI 데이터센터와 통신 부문 수요가 매출 성장을 주도하며 비즈니스 모멘텀 지속
전분기 대비 매출 15억 2,900만 달러에서 15억 8,100만 달러로 성장
전년 동기(13억 4,800만 달러) 대비 매출 15억 8,100만 달러로 성장세 지속

financialHighlights.text: Q1 FY26 매출 15억 8,100만 달러(전분기 15억 2,900만 달러, 전년 동기 13억 4,800만 달러)
GAAP EPS 1.23달러, 비GAAP EPS 1.16달러, 전년비 0.49달러 개선
4억 달러 규모 설비 투자 계획 공개로 용량 확대 의지 표명
비GAAP 매출총이익률 지속 개선으로 규모 확대에 따른 수익성 레버리지 가시화

watchItems.text: 4억 달러 설비 투자의 매출 기여 시점과 실제 용량 확대 속도가 주요 모니터링 포인트
전년 동기 매출 13억 4,800만 달러에서 15억 8,100만 달러로의 성장세 지속 여부 주목

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 d27982dex991.htm EX-99.1 EX-99.1 Exhibit 99.1 Coherent Corp. 375 Saxonburg Blvd. Saxonburg, PA 16056-9499 PRESS RELEASE COHERENT CORP. REPORTS FIRST QUARTER FISCAL 2026 RESULTS • Q1 REVENUE OF $1.58B, INCREASED 17% Y/Y AND, ON A PRO FORMA BASIS, 19% Y/Y ADJUSTED FOR SALE OF AEROSPACE & DEFENSE BUSINESS • Q1 GAAP GROSS MARGIN OF 36.6%, INCREASED 249 bps Y/Y; Q1 NON-GAAP GROSS MARGIN OF 38.7%, INCREASED 200 bps Y/Y • Q1 GAAP EPS OF $1.19, IMPROVED $1.23 Y/Y; Q1 NON-GAAP EPS OF $1.16, IMPROVED $0.49 Y/Y SAXONBURG, Pa., November 5, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) – Coherent Corp. (NYSE: COHR) (“Coherent,” “We,” or the “Company”), a global leader in photonics, announced financial results today for its first quarter of fiscal year 2026 ended September 30, 2025. Revenue for the first quarter of fiscal 2026 was $1.58 billion, with GAAP gross margin of  Normalized numeric aliases: $1.58 billion = 15억 8,000만 달러; $1.58 = 1.58달러; $1.19 = 1.19달러; $1.23 = 1.23달러; $1.16 = 1.16달러; $0.49 = 0.49달러.

share. On a non-GAAP basis, gross margin was 38.7% with net income per diluted share of $1.16. Jim Anderson, CEO, said, “Revenue growth of 19% year-over-year in the September quarter on a pro forma basis was driven by strong demand from AI-related datacenters and communications. We expect continued strong growth throughout this fiscal year based on increasing datacenter and communications demand along with our continued production capacity expansion.” Sherri Luther, CFO, said, “Significant revenue growth and gross margin expansion drove a year-over-year increase in our GAAP and non-GAAP EPS. During the quarter, we paid down $400 million of our debt. We also refinanced our debt which will reduce our interest expense and further strengthen our balance sheet.” 1 Selected First Quarter Financial Results and Comparisons (in millions, except percentages and per share data) Table 1 GAAP  Normalized numeric aliases: $400 million = 4억 달러; $1.16 = 1.16달러; $400 = 400달러.
